personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS Data Platform & AI/ML Pipeline Specialist

summary: AWS Data Engineer specializing in ML-enabled pipelines and scalable data platforms. Experienced in Dynatrace observability, performance analysis, and automation for enterprise systems. Skilled in Python scripting and cloud-based monitoring solutions to enhance application performance and infrastructure reliability.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines using Python/Pandas, ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints with BMC TrueSight, replacing manual processes.
Developed ML forecasting models with Prophet and scikit-learn, achieving 90%+ accuracy in predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform with S3, Glue, and Redshift for scalable telemetry processing and ML workloads.
Integrated monitoring feeds from TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting with executive dashboards.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on EC2/ECS for on-demand processing and capacity forecasting.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for critical hospitality systems and Brand.com.
Led 'FAST' project, data-mining real-user performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to provide optimization recommendations.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 with TLS 1.2 security enforcement, achieving zero regression in production monitoring.
Implemented End-User Monitoring (EUM) and end-to-end transaction tracing across web and mobile platforms.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace for unified load test and APM correlation.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Managed CA APM for TIAA-CREF, overseeing 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents enterprise-wide.
Led CA APM upgrades from 9.1 to 10.1 with zero unplanned downtime, coordinating cross-functional IT teams.
Designed custom Management Modules for dashboards, alerts, and SLA thresholds, adopted as client standards.
Built Perl/Ksh scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual processes.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic teams to resolve bottlenecks using APM telemetry insights.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Cloud & Data: AWS (Glue, Athena, S3, Bedrock), PySpark, Apache Spark, Hive/Hadoop, Data Warehousing (Redshift), ETL Design & Optimization
skills.AI/ML: Prophet (Time-Series Forecasting), scikit-learn, GenAI / LLM Agents
skills.Tools & Infra: Dynatrace (AppMon + Synthetics), BMC TrueSight / TSCO, CA APM / Introscope, Docker, Git, Airflow, Streamlit, Linux/Unix
skills.Legacy: C++, Java, PL/SQL, Oracle RAC, WebLogic / WebSphere, VB6 / VC++

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Developed an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine with Python and PySpark, reducing forecasting cycles by 90% using Prophet and scikit-learn models.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform with S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock, optimizing ETL processes for enterprise-scale performance monitoring.

projects.name: FAST Project
projects.description: Data-mined user performance metrics with Dynatrace to optimize critical systems, enhancing application performance and reliability.
